posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Our "Conflict Playbook" is progressing:

As oil prices hit $90/barrel and gas prices surge over +20%, the market is quickly pricing-in prolonged disruption.

This is exactly what happens in Step #6 of our playbook.

As we note below, the biggest variable now is the amount of time between Step #6, conflict pricing, and Step #7, conditional de-escalation.

At current prices, US CPI Inflation would near ~3.0% per our analysis, an unsustainable backdrop.

Our 2-4 week timeline remains in effect.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Innate intelligence in the smallest of things that we don’t really understand.  These molecules and atoms that make up blood cells collaborate to build us.  

There’s an incredible nano and micro level intelligence flowing through evolutionary history.  

The ‘me’ has great depth.  So much so, I often think in the ‘we’ as the collection of cells that collaborate to operate the ‘me’.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
